name: foundry
description: Build-verify-fix loop for Claude Code. V3 flow-reversal architecture (plugin v4.0.0): brownfield runs use grounded flow graphs + node-by-node deltas instead of end-state specs, eliminating endpoint-anchored plumbing hallucination. Greenfield/cosmetic runs unchanged. 5-stream verification (TRACE, FLOW_TRACE, PROVE, SIGHT, TEST). Forge plans. Foundry builds.
